summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Light Client Picking refine feature. All backend tests passed (7/7). Frontend UI verified: partial products show 'CATÉGORIE' badge and 'À compléter' text, 'Compléter' button opens inline refine panel with 3 cascading columns in dark theme, category is pre-selected, 'Confirmer' button appears, clicking product selection button calls PUT API and updates resolution from 'category' to 'product'. Admin panel also verified with cascading filters.
passed_tests: Backend: Create intervention with partial product (category_id only) → resolution='category'
Backend: FIFO suggestions work for partial products
Backend: GET /api/instances/available-stock returns filter_options with categories/types/specifications
Backend: PUT /api/interventions/{id}/products/{ip_id} with product_id auto-fills category/type/spec
Backend: Refine at filter level (category + type) changes resolution to 'type'
Backend: Intervention products properly enriched with category/type_obj/specification_obj/product objects
Backend: Full refine flow (create partial → view → refine → verify)
Frontend Light: Partial product card shows 'CATÉGORIE' badge in amber
Frontend Light: Partial product card shows 'À compléter' text in amber
Frontend Light: 'Compléter' button visible on partial products
Frontend Light: Clicking 'Compléter' opens inline refine panel
Frontend Light: Refine panel has 3 cascading columns (Catégorie, Modèle, Spécification) in dark theme
Frontend Light: Category is pre-selected when opening refine panel
Frontend Light: 'Confirmer : [selection]' button appears when filter selected
Frontend Light: Product selection button (checkmark) visible in stock results
Frontend Light: Clicking product selection calls PUT API and shows 'Produit complété' toast
Frontend Light: After refinement, card updates to show product name and location
Frontend Light: After refinement, 'CATÉGORIE' badge and 'À compléter' text disappear
Frontend Admin: Detail panel shows cascading filters for adding products
Frontend Admin: Refined product shows 'Produit' badge (green)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_light_picking_refine.py - Created new test file for Light Client Picking refine feature
seed_data_creation: Created test intervention with partial product (LIGHT-TEST) during testing, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Light Client Picking refine feature is fully implemented and tested. Key points: 1) Partial products (category_id only) show 'CATÉGORIE' badge and 'À compléter' text. 2) 'Compléter' button (data-testid='refine-btn-{ip_id}') opens inline refine panel. 3) Refine panel has 3 cascading columns in dark theme, pre-selects current category. 4) 'Confirmer' button (data-testid='refine-confirm-filter') confirms at filter level. 5) Product selection button (data-testid='refine-select-{product_id}') selects specific product. 6) PUT /api/interventions/{id}/products/{ip_id} with product_id auto-fills category/type/spec and changes resolution to 'product'. 7) Light Client auth uses PIN (1234 for test user).

completer_button.visibility: Visible on partial products, hidden on complete products

refine_panel.pre_selection: Category pre-selected based on product's category_id

PUT /api/interventions/{id}/products/{ip.auto_fill: Setting product_id auto-fills category_id, type_id, specification_id from product

GET /api/instances/available-stock.results: Returns products with instances and stock count
